mapper.select: select * from t_shop where id = #{id} and del_flag = 0
select id from t_shop where shop_type = #{shopType} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and is_syn_order = 1 and shop_authorize = '1'
SELECT * FROM `t_shop` where del_flag = '0' and mall_id = #{mallId}
SELECT * FROM `t_shop` where del_flag = '0' and is_expiration = '1' and shop_key = #{shopKey}
SELECT id FROM `t_shop` where shop_type = #{shopType} and del_flag = '0' and mall_id = #{mallId}
select s.* from t_shop s left join t_shop_detail d on s.id = d.shop_id where s.shop_type = '5' and s.del_flag = '0' and d.open_polish = '1'
SELECT shop_key FROM `t_shop` where shop_type = #{shopType} and del_flag = '0' and id = #{id}
